channel.title: Neon Champions Game Design
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Neon Champions Game Design

item.title: index
item.description: Neon Champions Game Design Index Last updated: 2026-05-30 Current phase: Phase 1 — Concept Review mode: Lean default, Full for major gates Start Here README — repository purpose and separation from worldbuilding.

item.title: log
item.description: Neon Champions Game Design Log Append-only project log.

item.title: SCHEMA
item.description: Neon Champions Game Design Schema Domain Production-facing game design and AI-assisted development control for Neon Champions.

item.title: GDD Reading Guide
item.description: GDD Reading Guide Use this page as the first stop for humans and LLM agents working inside design/gdd/.

item.title: Greenland Faction Unit Rosters
item.description: Greenland Faction Unit Rosters One-Line Summary The first-campaign factions still make sense if their units are not generic soldiers in different colors, but expressions of what each faction believes survival should become: local sovereignty, proprietary climate maintenance, certified polar control,...

item.title: Game Concept
item.description: Game Concept: Neon Champions Creative Brief Neon Champions is a single-player-first turn-based strategy/RPG inspired by Heroes of Might and Magic III and Olden Era, translated into a no-magic cyberpunk world where Champions lead factions through infrastructure wars, polluted information, body techno...

item.title: Game Pillars
item.description: Game Pillars Pillars Pillar: Strategic Clarity Under Dirty Information Definition: The player should make readable strategic choices in a world where information is partial, polluted, source-tagged, or politically shaped.

item.title: Systems Index
item.description: Systems Index Status: Draft. Use for system orientation and planning only; implementation still requires an approved GDD section or READY story.
